purpose: Prerequisite videos for Grade 4 NCERT Chapter 11: Fun with Symmetry
description: Videos covering: basic shape recognition, equal halves, matching and same-different concepts

videos.title: Basic Shapes Review | Identifying Shapes for Kids
videos.description: Review basic shapes like squares, rectangles, triangles, and circles. Knowing your shapes helps you find symmetry!
learningObjectives: Describe properties of shapes like sides and corners
Build foundation for recognising symmetry in shapes

videos.title: Equal Halves and Parts | Folding Shapes in Half
videos.description: Learn what it means to divide a shape into two equal halves. When both halves match perfectly, that is symmetry!
learningObjectives: Fold shapes into two matching parts
Connect equal halves to the idea of symmetry

videos.title: Matching and Same-Different | Comparing Shapes and Patterns
videos.description: Practise matching identical shapes and spotting what is the same and what is different. This skill helps you see symmetry!
learningObjectives: Identify what is the same and different between two shapes
Develop visual comparison skills for symmetry

usageNotes.purpose: Review shape recognition, equal halves, and matching before learning symmetry in Chapter 11
usageNotes.recommendationStrategy: Select based on weak concepts identified in readiness assessment
usageNotes.sequencing: Shape recognition → Equal halves → Matching and same-different
